standard_deduction.source: New York 2025 Form IT-201-I instructions, standard deduction table

dependent_exemption.source: New York 2025 Form IT-201-I instructions, line 36

itemized_deductions.state_local_tax_note: For New York purposes, state and local taxes paid in 2025 are not subject to the federal limit described in the 2025 NY itemized deduction guidance.
itemized_deductions.college_tuition_note: New York college tuition may be reviewed as a credit or itemized deduction; compare under New York instructions.
itemized_deductions.source: New York Tax Department 2025 itemized deductions guidance and Form IT-201-I

state_tax_brackets.note: Use New York 2025 resident/nonresident instructions and tax tables for exact computations. TaxMax agents should not compute final NY tax from this lightweight context.

college_tuition.note: Review whether the college tuition credit or itemized deduction may be more beneficial when education expenses are present.

notes: New York may allow itemized deductions even if the federal return uses the standard deduction.
State context is for opportunity review only, not final state tax computation.
